title: Anniversary House Metallic Silver Glitter Candle, Number 3, 3rd Birthday Cake Topper, 7 Centimeters, AHC40/3
features: BEAUTIFUL DESIGN - Each shaped number candle is made from a premium wax material and coated in a sparkling silver glitter finish.
STRONG AND STURDY - Designed with strength and quality in mind, and carefully packaged to arrive safely intact.

GREAT VALUE - Use alone or alongside another number to commemorate any birthday age or anniversary celebration; Designed in the UK; The highest quality products, always with independent product safety accreditation.
SLOW BURN - Use this cake candle for wish after wish; A long burn time means each one can be used multiple times.

THE PERFECT FINISHING TOUCH TO YOUR CAKE - The 7cm tall number candle adds an extra special statement to celebration cakes; Right on trend and photo-worthy; Use alone or alongside another number to commemorate any birthday age or anniversary celebration.
description: From the manufacturer FAMILY OWNED COMPANY WITH A LONG-STANDING BRITISH HERITAGE Anniversary House was founded over 65 years ago and we have been designing quality , trend-led cake decorations in the UK ever since! We're family owned and operated by a small group of wonderful people who are dedicated to bringing you innovative products and exceptional service . All of our Sugarcraft is handcrafted in the UK by an expert team of artisans, and we are proud of our heritage and to be supporting British manufacturing! EXTENSIVE PRODUCT OFFERING TO SUIT ALL YOUR CAKE DECORATING NEEDS At Anniversary House our mission is to provide simple and effective cake decorating solutions ! Whether you're a professional baker, home hobbyist, or just want to bake something special for a friend or loved one, we have the finishing touches you need to add the 'icing on the cake' so to speak! PRODUCTS CENTRED AROUND QUALITY, FUNCTION AND FUN We love to bake, decorate and celebrate! We also value attention to detail and service , so bringing you quality products that not only look good , but also function as you expect, is at the top of our to do list. Our team is focused on producing design-led quality baking accessories and cake decorations that we ourselves are proud to use!
